boundary: Rust/local owns scoring-engine regression coverage. Browser/Studio surfaces are read-only inspection only. Coverage uses state/shape assertions only; no timing, no network, no live browser, trusted writes, auto-apply, auto-merge, self-approval, automated fun score, quality verdict, production-ready claim, or Godot replacement/parity claim. Generated runs/artifacts remain untracked unless fixture-scoped. #1 and #23 remain open governance anchors.

scenarios.expect: readable one-line additive and multiplicative modifier effects validate and preserve score 16
opaque or multi-line effect text fails closed before state resolution
score resolution is digest-stable and matches substrate state score 16
modifier order is stable by order then modifier id and produces score 30
readable modifiers compose to final score 90 and a deterministic degenerate finding
Scoring-Engine Demo v1 manifest documents local replay without network or live browser
classic substrate determinism digest remains golden-stable
docs preserve generated-state boundaries, conservative wording, state/shape scope, and #1/#23 open anchors
